questions: How many balls can you juggle?
answers: Juggling is the skill of tossing and catching multiple objects in a continuous pattern. It's a performance art, circus skill, and even a form of exercise. Most people start with 3 balls and work their way up.

Juggling shikhte 3 ta ball nao, start with one ball toss, then two, then three. 'Cascade' is the basic 3-ball pattern. Consistent practice for a few weeks and you'll get it! YouTube tutorials help a lot.
Juggling improves hand-eye coordination, focus, reflexes, and even reduces stress. Studies show it can increase brain grey matter! Professional jugglers can handle 7-11 objects simultaneously.

World-class jugglers include Anthony Gatto, who holds multiple world records, and the Flying Karamazov Brothers. Modern jugglers combine juggling with comedy and other performance arts for amazing shows.
